ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the search engine configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the search engine configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Browser and device used for the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine configuration */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration setting (e.g., string, boolean, integer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration setting was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage metric */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine configuration */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage metric (e.g., usage_count, last_visited) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the usage metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage metric was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the usage metric (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine configuration */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the error occurred */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error (e.g., configuration, sync, access) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the error log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the error log was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the error (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser integration */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine configuration */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration was performed */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the browser integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the browser integration was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the browser used for integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom setting */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine configuration */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key of the custom setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the custom setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the custom setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the custom setting was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "search_engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine configuration */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON data of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
